Description.Value: A Baldur's-Gate-style free-orbit tactical camera. Hold the middle mouse button and drag to freely look around the battlefield: drag left/right to rotate (yaw) and up/down to tilt (pitch). The mouse wheel still zooms toward the screen centre, now with an extended range. Tune mouse sensitivity, invert-Y, pitch limits, and zoom range in the in-game mod settings. Tactical missions only; the stock Q/E rotation is left untouched.
